variant.sub: Stop consuming content. Build one real production-grade project — the right way — with structure and mentorship.

slide2.title: AI Native
slide2.description: Go from zero to deploying AI-powered apps in 8 weeks — with mentor code-reviews, verified assessments, and a portfolio companies actually look at.

syllabusModal.title: AI Native FullStack Developer
syllabusModal.description: A 5-module, mentor-led journey that combines product thinking, AI-native delivery, and telemetry-driven coaching. Each module ends with a cold-call style checkpoint and tutor review.

syllabus.title: Module 1 · Foundations
syllabus.summary: Learn how modern web development works in the AI era by mastering the core stack, essential tools, and your development environment.
topics: 1.1 Introduction to Web Development in the AI Era
1.4 Setting Up Your AI-Enhanced Development Environment

syllabus.title: Module 2 · Ideation & Planning
syllabus.summary: Use AI to validate ideas, research user needs, and translate them into structured project plans and requirements.
topics: 2.1 Brainstorming Web Application Ideas with AI
2.2 AI-Assisted Market Research and Persona Mapping

syllabus.title: Module 3 · Design & Architecture
syllabus.summary: Craft UX flows, UI systems, and technical architecture with AI copilots before moving into high-fidelity prototypes.

syllabus.title: Module 4 · Implementation
syllabus.summary: Build the full stack with AI assistance—from interactive frontends to production-ready backends.

syllabus.title: Module 5 · Testing & Hardening
syllabus.summary: Adopt AI-driven strategies for testing, debugging, optimization, and security reviews.
topics: 5.2 Debugging and Problem Solving with AI

syllabus.title: Module 6 · Deployment & Operations
syllabus.summary: Prepare, launch, and monitor your application using AI-powered deployment and observability workflows.

syllabus.title: Module 7 · AI Feature Integration
syllabus.summary: Bring intelligence into your app with LLM APIs, conversational interfaces, retrieval systems, and personalization.
topics: 7.1 Introduction to LLM APIs (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic)

syllabus.title: Module 8 · AI Orchestration & Scaling
syllabus.summary: Design production-grade AI pipelines with LangChain/LlamaIndex, advanced memory, streaming, and observability.

cards.message: You are an Absorber. We'll focus on high-velocity application over basic theory.

cards.title: Aspiring Builders
cards.short: Tired of 'tutorial hell'. Ready to prove competence.
cards.desc: For those who are tired of 'tutorial hell' and want to prove their competence through production-grade work.
cards.message: You are a Builder. We'll focus on real-world, production-grade projects.

learningFlowSystem.heading: You Don't Move Forward Until You Master It.
learningFlowSystem.subheading: Every concept is tested at five check-points before the next module unlocks.

steps.title: Learn Concept
steps.desc: Structured video + reading with in-context AI support.

steps.title: Micro Assessment
steps.desc: Short AI-graded check to confirm you absorbed the core idea.

steps.title: Cold Call Question
steps.desc: Random oral-style prompt. Timed. No hints. No re-reads.

steps.title: Module Quiz
steps.desc: Locked until steps 1–3 are cleared. Proves full mastery.

steps.title: Project Application
steps.desc: Apply what you learned in a real feature of your capstone project.

cohortSimulation.heading: Train Like You Already
bullets: 25-member cohort — structured like a real engineering team
Senior mentor assigned to each team for code reviews
Real-world workflows: standups, PRs, code reviews, deployments
cohortSimulation.quote:
"By the time you graduate,
you've already worked in a team."

features.title: Contextual AI Chatbot

features.title: The Smart Lock System
features.desc: Pass the assessment. Unlock the next module. No shortcuts.

chatBot.name: Ottolearn Assistant
chatBot.userMessage: Can you explain the useEffect hook again?
chatBot.botReply: Certainly! Based on the video at 2:30, `useEffect` handles side effects. It runs *after* the render.

items.question: How does the Lock System work?
items.answer: The Lock System ensures you master a concept before moving forward. You must score at least 80% on the module assessment to unlock the next video.

items.question: Is the certificate valid for jobs?
items.answer: Yes! Our certificates are industry-recognized and can be used to showcase your skills when applying for jobs and internships.

items.question: Are there any courses for free?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a free trial where you can explore the first module of every course to experience the platform yourself before deciding.

items.question: What happens if I fail an assessment?
items.answer: No worries! You can retake the assessment after a brief cooling-off period. We provide specific feedback on where you need to improve so you can master the content.

items.question: Are there any prerequisites for these courses?
items.answer: Most foundational courses start from scratch. For advanced tracks, we recommend completing the basic modules first or having a basic understanding of the core technologies.

items.question: Do I get lifelong access to the course content?
items.answer: Once you purchase a course or have an active Pro subscription, you have access to that content. Pro members get access to all courses while their subscription is active.

items.question: Is there a community or forum for help?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have a dedicated community and an in-platform discussion forum where you can interact with peers, share projects, and get help from mentors.

items.question: Can I pay using UPI or local Indian payment methods?
items.answer: Yes, we support all major Indian payment methods including UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), Net Banking, and Cards through our secure gateway.

callToAction.heading: Ready to transform
callToAction.subheading: Start your free trial. Build your first project this week.
